The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Loken III]] was the headquarters of [[TransTech Droidworks/Legends|TransTech Droidworks]]. It was the location of [[Power Station TD-332]], which [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] failed to protect from a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] assault during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Planet-stub}}
